headline: Paychex Taps Tapcheck On Demand Pay To Deepen PEO Offering
summary: Paychex (NasdaqGS:PAYX) has entered into a partnership with Tapcheck to offer on-demand pay for its PEO clients. The agreement introduces a fully embedded real-time earned wage access solution within the Paychex HR PEO platform. Employees paid through the platform can access earned wages instantly without changes to existing payroll systems. Paychex focuses on payroll, HR, and benefits services for businesses that want outsourced support for human capital management. The new Tapcheck...
